questions.question: What is the primary focus of Chapter 3 in the Thread Libraries Textbook?
What are the main topics covered in 3.1-3.4 of the Thread Libraries Textbook?
questions.explanation: Process Scheduling and Thread Synchronization are covered in 3.1-3.4

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'Thread Library' in the context of Chapter 3?
options: A framework for developing a thread-based operating system

questions.question: What are some key concepts that are discussed in Chapter 3?
What is the significance of the 'Stop-the-World' phenomenon in the context of thread management?
options: It allows for efficient thread creation
It enables threads to run concurrently
It occurs when the operating system must pause all threads to perform a synchronization operation
It is a measure of a thread's priority
questions.explanation: It occurs when the operating system must pause all threads to perform a synchronization operation
